First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HEPB_CHR_MEDICAID_EVER Hepatitis B - chronic - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HEPB_CHR_COMBINED_EVER Hepatitis B - chronic - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HEPC_ACT_COMBINED Hepatitis C - acute - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 HEPC_ACT_MEDICAID Hepatitis C -
